braceEscapedSurrogatePairLiteralType.ts(7,7): error TS2322: Type '"\uD83D\uDE00"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.
braceEscapedSurrogatePairLiteralType.ts(8,7): error TS2322: Type '"\uD83D\uDE00"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.
braceEscapedSurrogatePairLiteralType.ts(9,7): error TS2322: Type '"\uD83D\uDE00"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.


==== braceEscapedSurrogatePairLiteralType.ts (3 errors) ====
    // In JavaScript, "\u{D83D}\u{DE00}", "\uD83D\uDE00", and "😀" are all the
    // same string, so they should all have the same string literal type.
    const literal = "😀" as const;
    const braceEscaped = "\u{D83D}\u{DE00}" as const;
    const adjacentEscaped = "\uD83D\uDE00" as const;
    
    const a: "😀" = braceEscaped;
          ~
!!! error TS2322: Type '"\uD83D\uDE00"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.
    const b: typeof literal = braceEscaped;
          ~
!!! error TS2322: Type '"\uD83D\uDE00"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.
    const c: typeof adjacentEscaped = braceEscaped;
          ~
!!! error TS2322: Type '"\uD83D\uDE00"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.
